open.title: Cybersmart| Cape Town
open.description: We are investigating reports of no connectivity affecting clients on the Cybersmart network. We are working on identifying and resolve this issue as quickly as possible. We apologize for any inconvenience that this may be causing.

updates.content:
The root cause of the outage has been found and resolved. Client's who are still without service may need to reconfigure the Afrihost fibre router for PPPoE in order to restore connection. A guide to achieve this can be found here: https://help.afrihost.com/entry/how-to-set-up-your-tp-link-ex511-fibre-router-for-a-pppoe-connection
Alternatively please reach out to us on WhatsApp or our call centre for assistance. We sincerely apologise for any inconvenience.

open.title: Frogfoot outage | Swellendam
open.description: Frogfoot has informed us of a network outage affecting Swellendam, affected clients will experience limited to no connectivity . Frogfoot engineers are working on resolving this issue as soon as possible. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused.

updates.content:
Services on the Swellendam–Caledon–Riversdale route remain affected due to a widespread power failure impacting multiple sites along this corridor. The root cause is storm-related infrastructure damage, compounded by severe flooding in the area that is currently preventing Frogfoot technicians from safely accessing the affected sites.
Generator deployment is planned for all three sites; however, access roads remain impassable due to flooding. No confirmed ETA is available at this time. Further updates will be communicated as soon as conditions change.

updates.content: Multiple breaks on fibre backhaul and severe weather has hampered repairs. Balwin teams are actively working on resolving the issue. We sincerely apologise for any inconvenience.
